# Greece Vacation Search

> Greece Vacation Search is an online search tool with various search filters. It helps you find the right Greek island for your summer vacations.

## Pages
Information on the website and vacations in Greece
- [Why Greece](https://www.greecevacationsearch.com/why-greece.php): Reason for choosing Greece for your summer vacations.
- [Greek Islands FAQ](https://www.greecevacationsearch.com/greekisland-faq.php): Frequently Asked Questions about vacations on the Greek islands.
- [Greek Breakfast](https://www.greecevacationsearch.com/greek-breakfast.php): Information of the traditional Greek breakfast offered by hotels.
- [How-to-use](https://www.greecevacationsearch.com/how-to-use.php): How to use the Greece Vacation Search Engine, step by step walkthrough.

## Islands
List of Greek islands where you can go for vacations, along with each one's beaches.
- [Aegina](https://www.greecevacationsearch.com/destination.php?island=Aegina): Beaches, attractions and various vacation info on Aegina island.
  - [Agia Marina](https://www.greecevacationsearch.com/beach.php?name=Agia Marina&destination=Aegina): Information on Agia Marina beach.
